Obstructive sleep apnea._comment: Default anchor order among ELIGIBLE upstreams present on the chart for an OSA secondary claim. Mental-health cluster first (strongest literature; PTSD cited as the strongest-literature dx within the GAD/MDD/PTSD anti-pyramiding cluster), then obesity (chain intermediate), then weaker reverse pairs. Ranked by physician panel (panel-2026-06-10, Ryan-ratified).

Hypertension._comment: OSA-anchored first per direction-locked physiology (intermittent hypoxia + sympathetic activation), then mental-health cluster. Obesity below the SC drivers. Ranked by physician panel (panel-2026-06-10, Ryan-ratified).

GERD._comment: OSA-anchored first (negative intrathoracic pressure, direction-locked blessed), then mental-health (stress-mediated acid). Ranked by physician panel (panel-2026-06-10, Ryan-ratified).
